gt_sql: SELECT T1.country, T1.location FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'European Grand Prix' ORDER BY T2.year ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT c.country, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name = 'European Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.year
LIMIT 1;
question: In which country was the first European Grand Prix hosted? Name the circuit and location.
